# Mechanism Design
**Status:** Safe

Mechanism design remains above water because automated systems still respond to incentives. The task is to shape rewards, penalties, rights, and constraints so the system produces trustworthy behavior.

## Latest
- **2026-06-18** -- Mechanism design remains safe because the problem is incentives under automation. Tokenized stocks, state taxes, MiCA pressure, fraud response, and agent wallets all change what actors are rewarded or punished for doing. Sources: [Illinois digital asset tax, CoinDesk via Google News](https://news.google.?oc=5), [ZachXBT on Canada fraud response, Bitcoin.com](https://news.bitcoin.com/zachxbt-canada-more-negligent-on-crypto-fraud-than-india-or-nigeria/), [SEC tokenized stock trading, Reuters via Google News](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxOSU5DUG1RTzhGdHE3aDRHWTZ3RFRqR3l2Xy1INEVxUDlKQUtiXzlwZGg5YmIwdnlDYm4zSDNxS3dKU0ZtLWlSUGQ2ZFNFQU5ibkhmT2NvYnFmcEtUTVU1OFZsSkdNWHpSQnByRkNhdlhTM0VONUpSdW1BNGxKZThjMlZodXFyM18zYTJ1ckxSUmpjRllzRXNLN196SUFVa25JTk9lTXN1ZlFqLW1NVHN5VUZYekVjOUhf?oc=5)
